name: Pan-Seared Bison Tenderloin
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Smoked Elk or smoked Ham (julienned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix oil and chili powder together and rub evenly over filets. Let rest for 30 minutes.
2. Heat a saucepan and sear the filets on all sides, using lower heat. Cook until desired doneness (Medium Rare to Medium is recommended). Turn often during cooking.
3. Melt butter in the pan and add elk and mushrooms. Saute for 1 minute.
4. Add linguine and heat through, tossing until hot.
5. Add cream and stir until incorporated with the pasta.
6. Lightly charbroil vegetables.
7. Place pasta on a hot plate. Center the Bison filet and surround it with char-broiled vegetables.
